prompt: Create a bold square social media advertisement for a beard-growth product tutorial. Use a vivid royal blue gradient background with a high-contrast, editorial grooming-brand look. Show an extreme close-up of a Black man’s cheek, jawline, ear, and beard area on the right side of the frame, with detailed skin texture and short coarse beard hair. His left hand is holding a glass dropper near the beard line, and a clear droplet is about to touch the skin beneath the sideburn area; his other hand lightly presses the beard from below. In the blurred background near the center-left, place a white bottle with a blue label resembling minoxidil packaging, clearly out of focus so it reads as the product without stealing focus. At the very top, add small spaced uppercase branding text: SAUCY BEARD HAVEN. Below it, place a huge condensed bold white uppercase headline spanning nearly the full width: HOW TO USE IT. In the lower-left quadrant, add exactly 4 instructional bullet points with small gold diamond icons and clean white sans-serif text: 1) Apply 1ml directly to beard skin — not hair, 2) Massage in gently for 1–2 minutes, 3) Use twice daily: morning + night, 4) Don’t wash face for 4 hours after applying. At the bottom center, include a small circular beard-themed logo above a dark blue nameplate with the text “SaucyBeardHaven”. Lighting should be glossy and commercial, with crisp focus on the hands, dropper, and beard edge, creating a premium men’s grooming ad designed for Instagram.
